slides.text: Read each story carefully. Try to understand the mathematical concept explained. If you do not, try applying it in a real life situation, or comparing it to other things you do understand. Please ask for help if you are struggling or research it further.

Try to answer the question on a question slide. The slide will not move on unless you answer the question correctly. You can always go back to re-read previous parts incase you missed or want to revise something. Do not give up on your first try. You can attempt the problem through various ways if one doesn't work for you.

After correctly answering a question and clicking next, the question will vanish but the text from the slide will remain incase you want to revise something before moving on. Click next again to proceed to the next slide.
Once a lesson is finished, you can navigate back to the main page using the buttons, and proceed to a new lesson.
It is advised that the lessons are completed in order for both the correct story and mathematical development.
Calculators should not be used, except for perhaps a decimal multiplication in the 'Percentage Market', as this concept is explained further in a following section.

You are now ready to begin your journey in the land of Arithmetica. Make sure to take notes of the important math details and methods so as to re-use them later. Remember to learn, think, and have fun!
